sqlReaderQuery.value:
select t1.* from (select --ap.* 
ap.id
,ap.lessonId,
ap.levelId,
ap.strategy,
ap.videoFileName
,ap.pos
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateCreated
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap  inner join  dbo.Lesson l on ( ap.Lessonid=l.id  )
                                        inner join dbo.subscription s on (s.id=l.SubscriptionId   )
										inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (s.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_LessonStrategy t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL

select t1.* from (select --ap.* 
ap.Id
,ap.LessonId
,ap.TargetId
,ap.pos
,ap.hasActivity
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateCreated
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap inner join  dbo.Lesson l on ( ap.Lessonid=l.id  )
inner join dbo.subscription s on (s.id=l.SubscriptionId   )
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (s.accountInfoId=a.ID )
inner join dbo.Targets t on (t.id=ap.TargetId )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0
)t1
left join Temp_LessonTarget t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
